occasions: A rocket launch
A spacecraft roaring to life and climbing into the sky.
A first contact
The moment two species meet for the very first time.
A systems failure
Critical technology shutting down at the worst possible moment.
A colony founding
Pioneers planting their flag on a new world.
A hyperspace jump
Reality bending as a ship leaps between stars.
A science fair
Young inventors presenting wild ideas and working prototypes.
A distress signal response
A crew racing toward a cry for help in the void.
A terraforming ceremony
A barren world being officially declared habitable.
An alien invasion
An unknown force arriving with overwhelming power.
A time travel experiment
An attempt to reach into the past or future.
A cryo-awakening
Someone waking from frozen sleep into a changed world.
A spacewalk
A person stepping outside into the silence of space.
A rebellion
The oppressed rising up against those who hold power.
A starship christening
A new vessel receiving its name before its maiden voyage.
An evacuation
Everyone abandoning a place before it's too late.
A wormhole opening
A tunnel through space tearing open unexpectedly.
A supply drop
Essential resources arriving from far away.
